reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Navimow
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please re-authenticate to continue using your Navimow mowers.

abort.missing_configuration: The integration is not configured. Please follow the documentation.
abort.no_url_available: No URL available. For information about this error, check the help section.
abort.oauth_unauthorized: OAuth authorization error on token request: {error}
